title: BossLand v2.3
description: Boss Land extends vanilla gameplay by adding 15 unique custom bosses across multiple tiers.
body:
# ⚔️ BossLand v2.3

![Plugin Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26d291d1282e3fafff6e83782d251e8aa87c7ea6.png)

✨ *Face mighty bosses, claim powerful loot, and become a legend!*  
Maintained by **TwistyLime** – revived with full permission from the original creator, **Eliminator**.  

---

## 🌟 Features
- 🗡️ **15 Unique Bosses** – each with personality and power  
- ⚡ **Special Abilities** – deadly skills that challenge even veterans  
- 🏆 **Tiered Progression** – climb from Tier 1 → Tier 4  
- 🎁 **Custom Loot & Drops** – rewards worth the fight  
- ⛩️ **Summoning Shrines & Items** – call forth bosses on demand  
- 📖 **Interactive Guidebook** – recipes, loot tables & summoning info in a clean UI  

![Boss Collage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d4048e0d80589345ea46d0ffcf1a80d45f22467.png)

---

## 🔮 Shards
When defeating Tier 1 or Tier 2 bosses, they may drop **Boss Shards** – fragments of their dark essence.  

- ⚗️ Use shards to **craft summoning items** for stronger bosses  
- 🌀 Hold them in your hand for **special potion effects** – some helpful, some dangerous  

![Shard Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27db55fda85745242347839b303caeaee2518b05.png)  
![Shard Effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/512bf42b5c66c13562bd0a509995f47433e8542c.png)  

> *Dare to wield them… but beware the side effects!*  

---

## 📖 The Guidebook
No need to guess recipes or drops – the **BossLand Guidebook** gives you everything in an easy-to-use interface.  

- 🧾 Learn **summoning recipes**  
- 🎁 View **boss loot tables**  
- 🧙 See **Armor Drops** before the fight  
- 🔍 Clean, clickable **UI for players**  

![Guide GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9478c07f356902e0b643c7f7519ef98a4b172ed.png)  
![Guide GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aa0708fe6cabe6da329d615e6d63eb56edcb78d.png)  
![Guide GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/534961590f15de1c871fb9e4707d78dc74bc21a2.png)  

---

---

### ❓ Got Questions or Ideas?
I’d love your feedback!  
- 💬 [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/TwistyLime/BossLand/issues)  
- 📢 SpigotMC Thread Replies  
- 📩 Or DM me directly  

---

### ☕ Support My Work
BossLand is and always will be **free**. If you enjoy the plugin and want to help me keep adding new bosses and features, consider supporting me here:  

[![Buy Me A Coffee](https://img.shields.io/badge/☕-Buy%20Me%20a%20Coffee-yellow)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/TwistyLime)  

---

### 🌀 Coming Soon
- ⚔️ New Bosses with advanced mechanics  
- 🏰 New Boss Dimension
- 🎉 More events & loot to keep battles fresh  

Stay tuned – the adventure has only just begun!  
~ **TwistyLime**
